rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (ScaNN) and articulates the delta (combines anisotropic compression with disk-resident traversal), but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies technical challenge that the combination resolves is missing.
rationale.R1.7: Flags one missing or wrong citation (DiskANN's publication year).
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (the introduction does not cover the agreed J*(d)).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (omits HNSW from graph-based ANN introduction).
